titles.title: I Don't Have A Prayer Without You

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sometimes I feel like there's no way out My heart begins to doubt Your amazing grace But I know that Your word is true You have somehow Always seen me through Through my darkest days

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I don't have a prayer without You I don't have a chance without You Lord, I need you here tonight Would You please hold me tight Make my heart true I don't have a prayer without You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sometimes life feels like a ball and chain And I become a slave to a memory But I know that You've forgiven me You gave Your life at Calvary Just to set me free!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord, you're everything I need just take what's left of me Make me what I ought to be So You can use me Lord, don't You see
